name: fanbasis
description: Payments and payouts infrastructure for creators, influencers, and platforms (enterprise-focused commerce/recurring payments platform).

auth_methods.note: The official developer docs site is behind a login screen ('Login - FanBasis API Docsv3'), so public API authentication methods are not documented on accessible pages.

credential_access.note: The Enterprises page describes enterprise and partnership offerings, indicating access is likely via commercial engagement rather than open self-serve signup.

api_surface.note: The developer/docs root requires login and is not publicly readable, so the API surface (REST/GraphQL/both) cannot be confirmed from public pages.

buildability.note: Developer docs require login and API credentials appear to be partner/enterprise gated; without access to the private docs or an enterprise relationship, building against FanBasis is blocked.

queries: fanbasis developer API documentation site:fanbasis.com OR site:*.fanbasis.com fanbasis API developer docs "fanbasis" "API"
site:dev-docs.fanbasis.com authentication "API" OR "API key" OR "auth" fanbasis "dev-docs"
